name: Munnar
description: Beautiful hill station in Kerala, famous for tea gardens, pleasant climate, and trekking trails. Munnar offers stunning views and is a perfect getaway destination.

name: Alleppey Backwaters
description: Serene backwaters perfect for houseboat rides. Experience the beauty of Kerala's natural waterways with lush paddy fields and coconut palms.

name: Fort Kochi
description: Historic fort with rich cultural heritage. Features colonial architecture, Chinese fishing nets, and vibrant spice markets.

name: Athirappilly Waterfalls
description: Majestic waterfalls surrounded by lush greenery. A popular trekking destination and filming location for many movies.

name: Varkala Beach
description: Cliff-side beach with golden sand and unique rock formations. Great for swimming, cliff diving, and experiencing the sunset.

name: Bekal Fort
description: One of the largest and oldest forts in Kerala. Located on the beach with panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

name: Wayanad
description: Scenic hill station with trekking trails, waterfalls, and ancient caves. Popular for adventure activities and wildlife.

name: Kumarakom Lake
description: Peaceful lake sanctuary with migratory bird species. Ideal for bird watching and boat rides.
